current_active_queue.label: Real SDK Vertical Slice And Canonical Runtime Evidence
current_active_queue.why_now: Local AI Runtime keeps the same active queue after the strategic return. The repo still runs through canonical JSON/YAML intake on host_local, writes result.json as formal evidence, and keeps AgentBridge markdown as compatibility projection. With host_local crash recovery, lease helpers, exec fallback process-guard, and the minimal verification runner now landed, the next bounded execution sequence is AgentBridge-first intake wiring while the selector stays at promote_phase1_execution.

current_live_posture.summary: Local AI Runtime currently executes repo-side through canonical JSON/YAML intake on host_local, writes result.json as formal evidence, and keeps AgentBridge results as compatibility projection. host_local crash recovery, minimal lease lifecycle helpers, exec fallback process-tree guarding, and the minimal verification runner are now landed repo-side. Hermes -> AgentBridge -> Codex remains the product mainline and migration target, but AgentBridge-first intake and non-host_local runners are not wired yet. The GPT-5.4 gateway probe and the codex exec minimum probe are ready; network_proxy remains platform_na, so current live execution should still stay within pure local task boundaries.

certified_baseline.label: Hermes AgentBridge Historical Baseline And Strategic Reference
certified_baseline.claim_boundary: Hermes/AgentBridge remains the certified historical baseline and strategic north-star reference for Local AI Runtime as a three-layer product line. Current repo runtime truth still stays on canonical JSON/YAML intake plus result.json evidence and compatibility projection until later phases wire AgentBridge-first intake.
